sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ شَخْصٌ مَحْفَظَةً فِي الْحَافِلَةِ وَأَعَادَهَا لِصَاحِبِهَا.
sentences.translation: Osoba je pronašla novčanik u autobusu i vratila ga vlasniku.
sentences.translationEn: A person found a wallet on the bus and returned it to its owner.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْمَحْفَظَةُ تَحْتَوِي عَلَى نُقُودٍ وَبَطَاقَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Novčanik je sadržavao novac i kartice.
sentences.translationEn: The wallet contained money and cards.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَ صَاحِبُ الْمَحْفَظَةِ الشَّخْصَ الأَمِينَ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Vlasnik novčanika jako je zahvalio poštenom čovjeku.
sentences.translationEn: The wallet's owner thanked the honest person a lot.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْجَمِيعُ إِنَّ الأَمَانَةَ أَجْمَلُ صِفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Svi su rekli da je poštenje najljepša osobina.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone said that honesty is the most beautiful quality.
